references.text: Luong, TT, PH Hovenkamp & MSM Sosef. 2015. Revision of the fern genus Orthiopteris (Saccolomataceae) in Malesia and adjacent regions. PhytoKeys 53: 39–71

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Julie F. Barcelona & Pieter B. Pelser, 3 August 2022

species.citation: (Kunze) Copel. , Fern Fl. Philipp. 1 (1958) 87; ≡ Davallia campylura Kunze , Bot. Zeitung (Berlin) 8 (1850) 132; ≡ Saccoloma campylurum (Kunze) Mett. , Ann. Sci. Nat. (Paris), 4th Sér. 15 (1861) 80; ≡ Davallia inaequalis var. minor Hook. , Sp. Fil. 1 (1846) 180; Type: Cuming 119 (K, lecto; K, MICH, isolecto), Luzon. = Saccoloma moluccanum (Blume) Mett. var. stenolobum Christ , Bull. Herb. Boissier, 2nd Sér. 6 (1906) 1005; Type: Loher s.n. (P, holo), Luzon: Mabacal/Rizal, Mar-1906. ≠ Saccoloma tenue auct. non (Brack.) Mett. var. campylura. Distribution: Moluccas, New Guinea, Philippines. LEYTE, LUZON, MINDANAO, NEGROS. Native.
species.distribution: Borneo, Java, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, New Guinea, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Sumatra. BILIRAN, CAMIGUIN, CAMIGUIN DE BABUYANES, LEYTE, LUZON: Apayao, Bataan, Cagayan, Camarines Sur, Laguna, Nueva Vizcaya (photos), Quezon, MINDANAO: Bukidnon (photos), Davao Oriental, Davao del Sur, Sarangani, Zamboanga del Sur, MINDORO, NEGROS, PANAY (photos).
